description_long: This object consists of two cylindrical lotion bottles, each with a different dispensing mechanism. The bottle on the left features a white pump dispenser and a label with the brand 'Natureza' and green accents, along with a logo and some text. The bottle on the right has a flip-top cap that is open, revealing the dispensing spout, and a more minimal label design. Both bottles are made of semi-opaque plastic, with the contents inside not fully visible. The labels include printed text and some simple graphic elements, such as a leaf motif and a circular icon. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A pair of plastic lotion bottles, one with a pump dispenser and one with a flip-top cap, both featuring clean labels and subtle graphic elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bottles: the left bottle with a pump dispenser and clear branding, and the right bottle with an open flip-top cap.
description_view_1: Angled rear view highlighting the open flip-top cap and the side of the pump bottle, with less visible label details.
description_view_2: Back view showing the full label text on the pump bottle and the rear of the flip-top bottle.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pump bottle's label and the profile of the flip-top bottle.
